title: Manos Brujas
overview: Berenice uncovers the shocking truth that her mother led a witch cult responsible for a series of murders in their region. After her mother's sudden death, Berenice is forced to confront the dark legacy she has inherited and the sinister secrets that have long haunted her family. As she delves deeper into her mother's past, Berenice must grapple with the chilling implications of her lineage.
